omniProcessElements.name: Save-Responses
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Save", "remoteClass" : "discoveryfrmwrk.StoreResponses", "remoteMethod" : "invokeMethod", "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "Assessment.Name" : "1.5 Certification of Competency (EM Physician)" }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "omniProcessId" : "%omniProcessId%", "omniscriptId" : "%omniscriptId%", "Step1" : "%Step1%", "ContextId" : "%ContextId%" }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "useContinuation" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : true }

childElements.name: AIRWAY_TECHNIQUES_EM_Physician
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "AIRWAY TECHNIQUES-INCLUDING:\n
    \n
  • Cricothyrotomy
    • \n
  • Endotracheal intubation (adult and child)
    • \n
  • Percutaneous transtracheal ventilation
    • \n
  • Temporary ventilator management
    • \n
", "text" : "AIRWAY TECHNIQUES-INCLUDING:

  • Cricothyrotomy

  • Endotracheal intubation (adult and child)

  • Percutaneous transtracheal ventilation

  • Temporary ventilator management

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: AIRWAY_TECHNIQUES_EM_Physician_Response
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Response", "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: ANESTHESIA
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "ANESTHESIA-INCLUDING:\n
    \n
  • Conscious sedation
    • \n
  • Local anesthesia
    • \n
  • Rapid sequence intubation
    • \n
  • Regional nerve blocks
    • \n
", "text" : "ANESTHESIA-INCLUDING:

  • Conscious sedation

  • Local anesthesia

  • Rapid sequence intubation

  • Regional nerve blocks

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Response", "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "CustomLWC1", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "hide" : false, "lwcName" : "cfCompetency_UCPhysicianHeader", "bStandalone" : false, "customAttributes" : [ ] }

childElements.name: EM_Physician_ADMINISTRATIVE_AND_LEGAL_Response_V2
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Response", "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: EM_Physician_ADMINISTRATIVE_AND_LEGAL_V2
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "ADMINISTRATIVE AND LEGAL – INCLUDING:\n
    \n
  • Familiar with guidelines regarding transfer of patients
    • \n
  • Familiar with my obligation to abide by Hospital policy, and to coordinate with, and notify Hospital administration regarding any decision to divert a patient away from the ED
    • \n
  • Familiar with protocols as it pertains to use of restraints
    • \n
  • Proficient in basic computer skills required for completing electronic medical records order entry
    • \n
  • Familiar with the requirements of EMTALA
    • \n
  • Familiar with the requirements for medical screening examination for patients presenting to the ED, and my obligation to see all patients
    • \n
", "text" : "ADMINISTRATIVE AND LEGAL – INCLUDING:

  • Familiar with guidelines regarding transfer of patients

  • Familiar with my obligation to abide by Hospital policy, and to coordinate with, and notify Hospital administration regarding any decision to divert a patient away from the ED

  • Familiar with protocols as it pertains to use of restraints

  • Proficient in basic computer skills required for completing electronic medical records order entry

  • Familiar with the requirements of EMTALA

  • Familiar with the requirements for medical screening examination for patients presenting to the ED, and my obligation to see all patients

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: EM_Physician_CARDIAC
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "CARDIAC - INCLUDING:\n
    \n
  • Cardiopulmonary resuscitation
    • \n
  • Electrocardiogram (interpretation of 12 leads)
    • \n
  • Emergency cardioversion/defibrillation
    • \n
  • Management of acute cardiac emergencies including cardiac failure, myocardial infarction, cardiac dysrhythmias
    • \n
", "text" : "CARDIAC - INCLUDING:

  • Cardiopulmonary resuscitation

  • Electrocardiogram (interpretation of 12 leads)

  • Emergency cardioversion/defibrillation

  • Management of acute cardiac emergencies including cardiac failure, myocardial infarction, cardiac dysrhythmias

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: EM_Physician_CARDIAC_Response
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Response", "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: EM_Physician_DIAGNOSTIC_THERAPEUTIC_PROCEDURES
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "DIAGNOSTIC & THERAPEUTIC PROCEDURES – INCLUDING:
  • Arterial blood gases
  • Arthrocentesis
  • Urethral catheterization
  • Suprapubic catheterization
  • Gastric lavage
  • Incision and drainage of abscesses
  • Nasogastric/oral gastric tube placement
  • Emergency pericardiocentesis
  • Slit lamp exam
  • Preliminary plain film interpretations
  • Needle thoracentesis
  • Tonometry
  • Lumbar puncture
  • Needle/tube thoracostomy
", "text" : "DIAGNOSTIC & THERAPEUTIC PROCEDURES – INCLUDING:

  • Arterial blood gases

  • Arthrocentesis

  • Urethral catheterization

  • Suprapubic catheterization

  • Gastric lavage

  • Incision and drainage of abscesses

  • Nasogastric/oral gastric tube placement

  • Emergency pericardiocentesis

  • Slit lamp exam

  • Preliminary plain film interpretations

  • Needle thoracentesis

  • Tonometry

  • Lumbar puncture

  • Needle/tube thoracostomy

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "HEMODYNAMIC TECHNIQUES – INCLUDING: \n
    \n
  • Peripheral venous access
    • \n
  • Central venous access
    • \n
  • Intraosseus infusion
    • \n

  • Central venous access

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: EM_Physician_OBSTETRICAL_GYNECOLOGICAL_PROCEDURES
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "OBSTETRICAL/GYNECOLOGICAL PROCEDURES – INCLUDING: \n
    \n
  • Precipitous delivery of newborn
    • \n
  • Management of trauma in pregnancy
    • \n
  • Recognition and Management of emergency pregnancy complications
    • \n
  • Sexual Assault Examination
    • \n
", "text" : "OBSTETRICAL/GYNECOLOGICAL PROCEDURES – INCLUDING:

  • Precipitous delivery of newborn

  • Management of trauma in pregnancy

  • Recognition and Management of emergency pregnancy complications

  • Sexual Assault Examination

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Response", "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: EM_Physician_OCULAR_EMERGENCIES
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "OCULAR EMERGENCIES – INCLUDING:\n
    \n
  • Removal of superficial foreign body in conjunctiva or \ncornea
    • \n
  • Management of ocular trauma
    • \n
", "text" : "OCULAR EMERGENCIES – INCLUDING:

  • Removal of superficial foreign body in conjunctiva or
    cornea

  • Management of ocular trauma

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Response", "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: EM_Physician_ORTHOPEDICS
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "ORTHOPEDICS – INCLUDING:\n
    \n
  • Emergent/urgent closed reduction and splinting of fractures and dislocations
    • \n
  • Application of leg traction splint
    • \n
  • Cervical immobilization
    • \n
", "text" : "ORTHOPEDICS – INCLUDING:

  • Emergent/urgent closed reduction and splinting of fractures and dislocations

  • Application of leg traction splint

  • Cervical immobilization

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: EM_Physician_ORTHOPEDICS_Response
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Response", "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: EM_Physician_TRAUMA
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "TRAUMA – INCLUDING:\n
    \n
  • Interpretation of cervical spine x-rays
    • \n
  • Management of head injury
    • \n
  • Fluid resuscitation in shock (adults/pediatrics)
    • \n
  • Initial management of pediatric and adult trauma
    • \n
  • Gunshot wounds and knife injuries
    • \n
", "text" : "TRAUMA – INCLUDING:

  • Interpretation of cervical spine x-rays

  • Management of head injury

  • Fluid resuscitation in shock (adults/pediatrics)

  • Initial management of pediatric and adult trauma

  • Gunshot wounds and knife injuries

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: EM_Physician_TRAUMA_Response
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Response", "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: EM_Physician_WOUND_MANAGEMENT
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "WOUND MANAGEMENT – INCLUDING:\n
    \n
  • Repair of lacerations
    • \n
  • Foreign body removal from superficial site or readily \naccessible body cavities
    • \n
  • Emergency management of burn victims
    • \n
", "text" : "WOUND MANAGEMENT – INCLUDING:

  • Repair of lacerations

  • Foreign body removal from superficial site or readily
    accessible body cavities

  • Emergency management of burn victims

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Response", "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: OTHER_SKILLS_AND_CONDITIONS
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 6.0, "label" : "OTHER SKILLS AND CONDITIONS - INCLUDING:
  • Acute psychiatric illness
  • Alcohol overdose and withdrawal symptoms
  • Management of poisonings
  • Management of drowning and near drowning
  • Management of patients with altered level of consciousness
  • Other procedures necessary to save life or limb
  • Evaluation and management of pediatric and neonatal illnesses, injury and emergencies
  • Performing and interpreting bedside ultrasound
", "text" : "OTHER SKILLS AND CONDITIONS - INCLUDING:

  • Acute psychiatric illness

  • Alcohol overdose and withdrawal symptoms

  • Management of poisonings

  • Management of drowning and near drowning

  • Management of patients with altered level of
    consciousness

  • Other procedures necessary to save life or
    limb

  • Evaluation and management of pediatric and
    neonatal illnesses, injury and emergencies

  • Performing and interpreting bedside
    ultrasound

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: OTHER_SKILLS_AND_CONDITIONS_Response
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6.0, "label" : "Response", "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100.0, "optionHeight" : 100.0, "imageCountInRow" : 3.0, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: Step1
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "EMERGENCY DEPARTMENT – PHYSICIAN – CERTIFICATION OF COMPETENCY", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3, "nextLabel" : "Next", "nextWidth" : 3, "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : true, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }
